reports.description: A lightning struck a house causing fire and damage. The time was based on radar data and Blitzortung lightning detection system.
references: "Udar strele povzročil požar v novogradnji v Šiški, škode za več tisoč evrov", 24ur, 20 APR 2026.

reports.description: A lightning struck a house causing damage to roof and electrical installation. The time was based on radar data and Blitzortung lightning detection system.
references: "Grom udario kuću tokom nevremena: Vatrogasci objavili fotografije", HAYAT, 20 APR 2026.
"Blitzeinschlag in Wirtschaftsgebäude fordert Feuerwehreinsatz", VK24.at, 20 APR 2026

reports.description: Damage to orchards and fruits were reported. The time was based on radar data.
references: " Snažno nevrijeme s gradom pogodilo dijelove Hrvatske, stižu snimke: ‘Horor, zamračilo se‘", Novi.ba, 20 APR 2026.

reports.description: Damaged roof by hail was reported. The time was based on radar data.
references: "Udar strele povzročil požar v novogradnji v Šiški, škode za več tisoč evrov", 24ur, 20 APR 2026.
